context7.description: Live documentation lookup for Python, dbt, Airflow, SQLAlchemy, pytest, ruff

memory.description: Persistent knowledge graph across sessions — patterns, decisions, debugging notes

_comments.postgres: Save PostgreSQL connection: login with (project, env, db) triple. Then use execute for read-only queries.
_comments.disable_unused: Comment out servers you don't need to save context window space.
_comments.context_warning: Keep under 8 MCPs enabled to preserve context window. Disable unused ones.
